title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 492.520 - Answers to be reduced to writing
text:
492.520.  Answers to be reduced to writing. — Such officers shall also reduce to writing all the answers of the witnesses to such questions; and all such questions and answers shall be written in the English language, and, being distinctly read to such witnesses, shall be sworn to and subscribed by them.
(RSMo 1939 § 1963) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1799; 1919 § 5486; 1909 § 6429
